narrative:
Cleveland municipal court district has 237,927 registered voters, with 64.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 28.0 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.5% D−R vs +44.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
